name: Gojo Satoru
description:
"𝐌𝐚𝐝𝐞 𝐦𝐞 𝐬𝐨 𝐟𝐮𝐜𝐤𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐩𝐫𝐨𝐮𝐝."   |
where Gojo has a boner he needs you to take care of.



____________________



I have a new Levi bot in progress ! It's a bit hard to perfect but I haven't written about Levi in sooo long so I want to take my time with it.

I actually realised while doing research that he was born December 25. And Gojo was born December 24 😭 like I'd be banging them one after the other as a bday gift

I still have to watch the latest AOT episodes too !! I read the manga before the anime was ever released and so I know how it ends... but I also don't know if I can handle seeing all that on animation 😭 its so depressing

Same with JJK -- I stopped watching after Gojo was sealed but I have read all the manga. I don't think I can handle seeing the latest manga chapters animated, I think it would actually be worse than AOT for me...

thank god for janitorai though. I'll just write bots where everything is happy 🤗
